creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wen
Date: Thu Jun 20 00:59:21 2013
New Revision: 321343
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/321343

Log:
  - Update to 1.9
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - Trim Makefile headers
  
  PR:		179163
  Submitted by:	Zhihao Yuan <lichray@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/lang/scheme48/Makefile
  head/lang/scheme48/distinfo
  head/lang/scheme48/pkg-plist

Modified: head/lang/scheme48/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/scheme48/Makefile	Wed Jun 19 23:51:05 2013	(r321342)
+++ head/lang/scheme48/Makefile	Thu Jun 20 00:59:21 2013	(r321343)
@@ -1,29 +1,48 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:    scheme48
-# Date created:         25 Aug 1997
-# Whom:                 jmacd
-#
+# Created by: jmacd
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	scheme48
-PORTVERSION=	1.8
+PORTVERSION=	1.9
 CATEGORIES=	lang scheme
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.s48.org/${PORTVERSION}/
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	lichray@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	The Scheme Underground's implementation of R5RS
 
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
+LICENSE=	BSD
 
-CONFLICTS=	scsh-*
+CONFLICTS=	scsh-[0-9]*
 
+ALL_TARGET=	enough
+USE_GMAKE=	yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-LDFLAGS+=	${PTHREAD_LIBS}
 
-ALL_TARGET=	enough
 MAN1=		scheme48.1
 
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
+PLIST_SUB+=	VER=${PORTVERSION}
+
+post-patch:
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} \
+		-e 's/-mthreads/${PTHREAD_LIBS}/' \
+		-e 's/-mt/${PTHREAD_LIBS}/' \
+		-e 's/-munaligned-double//' \
+		${WRKSRC}/configure
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} \
+		-e '/INSTALL.*COPYING/d' \
+		${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+USE_TEX=        yes
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--docdir=${DOCSDIR}
+.else
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} \
+		-e 's/install-doc$$//' \
+		-e 's/go doc$$/go/' \
+		${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
+.endif
+
 test:
 	cd ${WRKSRC}; ${MAKE} check

==============================================================================
